description_long: This object is a modern wall-mounted radiator, featuring a rectangular metal frame with a series of evenly spaced horizontal bars forming the main heat-dissipating surface. The bars are tubular and run parallel to each other, creating a ladder-like appearance, and are likely made of steel or aluminum for efficient heat transfer. The radiator is mounted on a flat, rectangular backplate that provides structural support and facilitates wall installation. A small valve or control knob is visible on one side, suggesting manual adjustment of water or heat flow. The finish is a dark metallic gray, giving it a sleek, contemporary look suitable for urban interiors or utility spaces. The overall design is minimalist, with no decorative elements, focusing on functionality and efficient heat emission.
description: A sleek, wall-mounted radiator with horizontal tubular bars and a dark metallic finish, designed for efficient heat emission and modern urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of horizontal bars and the rectangular backplate.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the radiator's slim profile and protruding valve or control knob.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, flat backplate with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the valve or control knob.
attribute_pipe_connections: single side entry, right side, horizontal orientation
